interactions: m_c and r_c watch the stars together.
m_c tells r_c a story about StarClan.
m_c had a scary nightmare about the Dark Forest.
m_c has been seeing scary shadows.
m_c prayed for some rain to water the herbs, and it came!
m_c thanks StarClan for leading {PRONOUN/m_c/object} towards a brand new herb patch.
m_c hopes StarClan is proud of {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} work.
m_c gazes up at the stars, trying to guess which ones are {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} fallen Clanmates.
m_c finds a strangely sparkly feather in {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} nest and wonders if it's a sign.
m_c considers if somewhere darker than StarClan might hold the answers {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/seek/seeks}.
m_c finds more comfort in the darkness than {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} used to.
m_c is hearing strange, malicious voices in {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} dreams.
m_c and r_c have a heated argument about faith. In the end, m_c is able to slightly sway r_c away from StarClan.
m_c tells r_c about {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} disdain for StarClan.
m_c has a dream about the Dark Forest after speaking with r_c.
